name: digital_technology_access_and_ownership
description: Measures the actual stock of digital and communication devices in the household, capturing material access to the information society. Together these items form a composite index of household technological endowment.

name: media_consumption_breadth
description: Measures how actively and across how many channels an individual consumes news and information content, spanning television, radio, print, and online media. Reflects the overall intensity and diversity of media engagement rather than preference for any single outlet.

name: internet_engagement_and_digital_literacy
description: Captures both the self-assessed proficiency with which respondents navigate the internet and the range of purposeful online activities they undertake, reflecting functional digital competence beyond mere access.

name: media_trust_and_quality_evaluation
description: Measures respondents' critical assessment of Mexican media institutions, including perceived completeness and accuracy of information, overall content quality, and satisfaction with how public affairs are covered.

name: perceived_media_social_impact
description: Measures beliefs about the societal consequences of media content, including its portrayal of violence, its representation of women, its influence on family relationships, and the perceived necessity of regulatory oversight.
